embedding.apiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for OpenAI embeddings (or use ${OPENAI_API_KEY})

synapcores.apiKey.label: SynapCores API Key
synapcores.apiKey.help: API key for the SynapCores gateway (or use ${SYNAPCORES_API_KEY})

synapcores.useHttps.label: Use HTTPS
synapcores.useHttps.help: Connect to the SynapCores gateway over TLS

collection.label: Memory Collection
collection.help: SynapCores collection name used to store memories

graph.label: Memory Graph
graph.help: SynapCores graph name used for memory relations (SIMILAR_TO edges + recallRelated walks).

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context

autoLinkSimilar.label: Auto-Link Similar Memories
autoLinkSimilar.help: On capture, draw SIMILAR_TO graph edges to existing memories with cosine similarity > 0.7 so recallRelated returns useful neighborhoods (adds ~30-50ms per capture).

workspace.label: Workspace ID
workspace.help: Optional workspace name suffixed onto the AutoML relevance model so multiple installations sharing one gateway can train independent models.
